channel.title: 中国日报-国内
channel.description: 中国日报-国内 RSS Feed

item.title: Education, health fees among key concerns
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China to legislate on preschool education

item.title: Education, health fees among key concerns
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China to legislate on preschool education

item.title: International group praises green revival
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A high-level international advisory body applauded China's efforts to improve the environment and suggested a 15-year strategy against pollution in a draft recommendation report on Monday.

item.title: International group praises green revival
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A high-level international advisory body applauded China's efforts to improve the environment and suggested a 15-year strategy against pollution in a draft recommendation report on Monday.

item.title: Beijing, Moscow drill for potential missile warfare
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China and Russia kicked off their second joint computer-assisted anti-missile drill on Monday, a move experts said could deter potential missile threats amid rising tensions on the Korean Peninsula.

item.title: Beijing, Moscow drill for potential missile warfare
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China and Russia kicked off their second joint computer-assisted anti-missile drill on Monday, a move experts said could deter potential missile threats amid rising tensions on the Korean Peninsula.

item.title: Memorial Day a time to 'remember', 'inspire'
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed during the War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression (1931-45) brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

item.title: Memorial Day a time to 'remember', 'inspire'
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A memorial service to mark the 80th anniversary of the Nanjing Massacre committed during the War of Resistance Against Japanese Aggression (1931-45) brought together hundreds of activists and members of the Chinese and other Asian communities on Sunday in San Francisco.

item.title: More military technologies targeted for civilian sector to boost economy
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China will strengthen innovation by developing high-tech industries with military technologies to boost military-civil integration, a move that aims to cultivate new growth drivers and boost the economy, said a recent State Council guideline.

item.title: More military technologies targeted for civilian sector to boost economy
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China will strengthen innovation by developing high-tech industries with military technologies to boost military-civil integration, a move that aims to cultivate new growth drivers and boost the economy, said a recent State Council guideline.

item.title: More military technologies targeted for civilian sector to boost economy
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China will strengthen innovation by developing high-tech industries with military technologies to boost military-civil integration, a move that aims to cultivate new growth drivers and boost the economy, said a recent State Council guideline.

item.title: More military technologies targeted for civilian sector to boost economy
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China will strengthen innovation by developing high-tech industries with military technologies to boost military-civil integration, a move that aims to cultivate new growth drivers and boost the economy, said a recent State Council guideline.

item.title: Dangerous stunts get thumbs-down from video platforms
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Multiple social media and video streaming platforms will limit who can view videos that depict dangerous stunts - and may even prohibit such material - in an effort to discourage imitators.

item.title: Dangerous stunts get thumbs-down from video platforms
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Multiple social media and video streaming platforms will limit who can view videos that depict dangerous stunts - and may even prohibit such material - in an effort to discourage imitators.

item.title: Taiwan's New Party vows to help improve relations
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Top political adviser Yu Zhengsheng met with a Taiwan delegation representing the island's New Party in Beijing on Monday to discuss the peaceful development of cross-Straits relations and how to achieve the "great rejuvenation" of the Chinese nation.

item.title: Taiwan's New Party vows to help improve relations
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Top political adviser Yu Zhengsheng met with a Taiwan delegation representing the island's New Party in Beijing on Monday to discuss the peaceful development of cross-Straits relations and how to achieve the "great rejuvenation" of the Chinese nation.

item.title: Taiwan's New Party vows to help improve relations
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Top political adviser Yu Zhengsheng met with a Taiwan delegation representing the island's New Party in Beijing on Monday to discuss the peaceful development of cross-Straits relations and how to achieve the "great rejuvenation" of the Chinese nation.

item.title: Former Chongqing political official facing corruption investigation
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China, has been placed under investigation on suspicion of accepting bribes, according to the Supreme People's Procuratorate on Monday.

item.title: Former Chongqing political official facing corruption investigation
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China, has been placed under investigation on suspicion of accepting bribes, according to the Supreme People's Procuratorate on Monday.

item.title: Former Chongqing political official facing corruption investigation
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China, has been placed under investigation on suspicion of accepting bribes, according to the Supreme People's Procuratorate on Monday.

item.title: Former Chongqing political official facing corruption investigation
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China, has been placed under investigation on suspicion of accepting bribes, according to the Supreme People's Procuratorate on Monday.

item.title: Satellite lofted for first Arab country
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A Chinese-made communications satellite became the first "export" of such a spacecraft to an Arab country when it was launched by China on Monday for Algeria.

item.title: Satellite lofted for first Arab country
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A Chinese-made communications satellite became the first "export" of such a spacecraft to an Arab country when it was launched by China on Monday for Algeria.

item.title: Satellite lofted for first Arab country
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A Chinese-made communications satellite became the first "export" of such a spacecraft to an Arab country when it was launched by China on Monday for Algeria.

item.title: Satellite lofted for first Arab country
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A Chinese-made communications satellite became the first "export" of such a spacecraft to an Arab country when it was launched by China on Monday for Algeria.

item.title: Water diversion project drives environmental improvements and provides new jobs for locals
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Green industries such as eco-agriculture and tourism are helping to raise living standards along the program's central route

item.title: Water diversion project drives environmental improvements and provides new jobs for locals
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Green industries such as eco-agriculture and tourism are helping to raise living standards along the program's central route

item.title: Water diversion project drives environmental improvements and provides new jobs for locals
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Green industries such as eco-agriculture and tourism are helping to raise living standards along the program's central route

item.title: Oldest Nanjing Massacre survivor dies at 100
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The oldest survivor of the Nanjing Massacre died on Sunday, and fewer than 100 survivors remain, the Memorial Hall of the Victims in the Nanjing Massacre said on Monday.

item.title: Oldest Nanjing Massacre survivor dies at 100
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The oldest survivor of the Nanjing Massacre died on Sunday, and fewer than 100 survivors remain, the Memorial Hall of the Victims in the Nanjing Massacre said on Monday.

item.title: Oldest Nanjing Massacre survivor dies at 100
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The oldest survivor of the Nanjing Massacre died on Sunday, and fewer than 100 survivors remain, the Memorial Hall of the Victims in the Nanjing Massacre said on Monday.

item.title: AIIB loans $250m for Beijing coal-to-gas conversion
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank announced on Monday a $250 million loan for a natural gas project in Beijing, the bank's first such investment in China, to help cut coal use and improve air quality in the capital area.

item.title: AIIB loans $250m for Beijing coal-to-gas conversion
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank announced on Monday a $250 million loan for a natural gas project in Beijing, the bank's first such investment in China, to help cut coal use and improve air quality in the capital area.

item.title: AIIB loans $250m for Beijing coal-to-gas conversion
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank announced on Monday a $250 million loan for a natural gas project in Beijing, the bank's first such investment in China, to help cut coal use and improve air quality in the capital area.

item.title: Discovering Yunnanâs Tibetan Plateau - A personal Shangri-La
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: High in the northwestern uplands of Yunnan lies a popular destination known as Shangri-La since 2001. When Bruce Connolly visited it in 1995, it was called Zhongdian. A town partly fulfilling Bruceâs Tibetan dream.

item.title: Discovering Yunnanâs Tibetan Plateau - A personal Shangri-La
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: High in the northwestern uplands of Yunnan lies a popular destination known as Shangri-La since 2001. When Bruce Connolly visited it in 1995, it was called Zhongdian. A town partly fulfilling Bruceâs Tibetan dream.

item.title: Xi: Uproot undesirable work styles
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: General Secretary Xi Jinping warns about the recurrence of undesirable work styles - formalities for formalities' sake, hedonism, and extravagance.

item.title: Xi: Uproot undesirable work styles
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: General Secretary Xi Jinping warns about the recurrence of undesirable work styles - formalities for formalities' sake, hedonism, and extravagance.

item.title: Xi: Uproot undesirable work styles
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: General Secretary Xi Jinping warns about the recurrence of undesirable work styles - formalities for formalities' sake, hedonism, and extravagance.

item.title: Xi-style diplomacy brings China closer to world
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Xi-style diplomacy brings China closer to world

item.title: Xi-style diplomacy brings China closer to world
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Xi-style diplomacy brings China closer to world

item.title: Xi-style diplomacy brings China closer to world
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Xi-style diplomacy brings China closer to world

item.title: China to hold annual memorial for Nanjing Massacre victims
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China will hold an annual memorial for the victims of the Nanjing Massacre, in the eastern city of Nanjing Wednesday.

item.title: Beijingâs Haidian district halts removal of building signs
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Urban management authorities in Beijingâs Haidian district have suspended the removal of signs and billboards from buildings, and have not made a decision when work would resume.

item.title: PLA Navy stations women on Nansha Islands for the 1st time
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Peopleâs Liberation Army has sent 10 of its female members to join the garrison guarding the Nansha Islands in the South China Sea, according to the PLA Navy.

item.title: PLA Navy stations women on Nansha Islands for the 1st time
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Peopleâs Liberation Army has sent 10 of its female members to join the garrison guarding the Nansha Islands in the South China Sea, according to the PLA Navy.

item.title: PLA Navy stations women on Nansha Islands for the 1st time
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Peopleâs Liberation Army has sent 10 of its female members to join the garrison guarding the Nansha Islands in the South China Sea, according to the PLA Navy.

item.title: Forum tackles urban problems for sustainable future
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A forum tackling the more challenging problems in urban development gathered people in this area on Saturday to raise awareness of greener and more sustainable urban development.

item.title: Emojis frown on corruption
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: An emojis package highlighting the eight-point austerity rules has become a hit on the internet.

item.title: Emojis frown on corruption
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: An emojis package highlighting the eight-point austerity rules has become a hit on the internet.

item.title: Suzhou police catch gang selling fake Herbalife products
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Police in eastern China said on Monday they have smashed an operation that made more than 20 million yuan ($3 million) from selling fake Herbalife products.

item.title: Jack Ma Foundation pledges millions to boost rural education
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Jack Ma Foundation has pledged to spend at least 300 million yuan ($45 million) in the next decade to staff rural schools with qualified teachers.

item.title: New Party delegation from Taiwan visits mainland
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The director of the State Council's Taiwan Affairs Office met with a delegation from Taiwan's New Party on Monday to promote peaceful development of cross-Straits relations.

item.title: New Party delegation from Taiwan visits mainland
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The director of the State Council's Taiwan Affairs Office met with a delegation from Taiwan's New Party on Monday to promote peaceful development of cross-Straits relations.

item.title: NGO helps epileptic boy realize racing dream in Zhejiang
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: An NGO helped an epileptic boy from eastern China realize his dream to ride a race car on an international circuit on Monday.

item.title: NGO helps epileptic boy realize racing dream in Zhejiang
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: An NGO helped an epileptic boy from eastern China realize his dream to ride a race car on an international circuit on Monday.

item.title: Six killed in Hebei bath house fire
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Six people were killed on Sunday afternoon in a fire at a bath house in Yongnian district of Handan, Hebei province, authorities said on Monday.

item.title: Six killed in Hebei bath house fire
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Six people were killed on Sunday afternoon in a fire at a bath house in Yongnian district of Handan, Hebei province, authorities said on Monday.

item.title: Residents mobilized to protect environment in Tibet
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Residents of southwest China's Tibet autonomous region have been mobilized for government-paid patrolling jobs to protect the ecosystem on the "roof of the world."

item.title: Residents mobilized to protect environment in Tibet
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Residents of southwest China's Tibet autonomous region have been mobilized for government-paid patrolling jobs to protect the ecosystem on the "roof of the world."

item.title: Israeli feels special connection to Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A young foreign man walks around the city, giving big hugs to the strangers he meets on the streets in Harbin, capital of Northeast Chinaâs Heilongjiang province.

item.title: Israeli feels special connection to Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A young foreign man walks around the city, giving big hugs to the strangers he meets on the streets in Harbin, capital of Northeast Chinaâs Heilongjiang province.

item.title: Honor mobile phone leading in AI speed
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Many commentators have deemed 2017 to be year one for the artificial intelligence smartphone as iPhone X and Honor V10 launched into the highly competitive but uniform cellphone market. So will an intelligent phone be the next great breakthrough?

item.title: Xiâan security guard dies trying to save suicidal woman
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Police in Xiâan, Shaanxi province, are investigating the death of a security guard who tried to catch a woman who jumped from the 11th floor of a building, Huashang Daily reported on Monday.

item.title: Xiâan security guard dies trying to save suicidal woman
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Police in Xiâan, Shaanxi province, are investigating the death of a security guard who tried to catch a woman who jumped from the 11th floor of a building, Huashang Daily reported on Monday.

item.title: 'Naughty' elephant damages two vehicles in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A wild Asian elephant turned a highway in southwest China's Yunnan province into its playground, damaging a minibus and a sedan Saturday afternoon.

item.title: 'Naughty' elephant damages two vehicles in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A wild Asian elephant turned a highway in southwest China's Yunnan province into its playground, damaging a minibus and a sedan Saturday afternoon.

item.title: 'Naughty' elephant damages two vehicles in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A wild Asian elephant turned a highway in southwest China's Yunnan province into its playground, damaging a minibus and a sedan Saturday afternoon.

item.title: Algerian boy, 12, wins Shenzhen talent contest
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A 12-year-old Algerian boy was crowned winner of the eighth Shenzhen Expats Chinese Talent Competition on Sunday.

item.title: Algerian boy, 12, wins Shenzhen talent contest
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: A 12-year-old Algerian boy was crowned winner of the eighth Shenzhen Expats Chinese Talent Competition on Sunday.

item.title: Duke Kunshan starts search for bachelorâs degree students
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Duke Kunshan University, a joint venture between Duke University in the US and Chinaâs Wuhan University, has started to enroll its first class of undergraduate students.

item.title: Duke Kunshan starts search for bachelorâs degree students
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Duke Kunshan University, a joint venture between Duke University in the US and Chinaâs Wuhan University, has started to enroll its first class of undergraduate students.

item.title: Duke Kunshan starts search for bachelorâs degree students
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Duke Kunshan University, a joint venture between Duke University in the US and Chinaâs Wuhan University, has started to enroll its first class of undergraduate students.

item.title: Former Chongqing Party chief under investigation
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former Party chief of Chongqing, is being investigated on allegations of bribery, State prosecutors said on Monday.

item.title: Former Chongqing Party chief under investigation
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former Party chief of Chongqing, is being investigated on allegations of bribery, State prosecutors said on Monday.

item.title: Former Chongqing Party chief under investigation
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Sun Zhengcai, the former Party chief of Chongqing, is being investigated on allegations of bribery, State prosecutors said on Monday.

item.title: Top procuratorate investigates Sun Zhengcai
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Supreme People's Procuratorate (SPP) of China announced on Monday that it has started investigation into Sun Zhengcai, former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC).

item.title: Top procuratorate investigates Sun Zhengcai
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The Supreme People's Procuratorate (SPP) of China announced on Monday that it has started investigation into Sun Zhengcai, former secretary of Chongqing Municipal Committee of the Communist Party of China (CPC).

item.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, stressed that the fight against undesirable work styles should not be stopped.

item.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, stressed that the fight against undesirable work styles should not be stopped.

item.title: Xi stresses nonstop efforts to fight undesirable work styles
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: Xi Jinping, general secretary of the Communist Party of China Central Committee, stressed that the fight against undesirable work styles should not be stopped.

item.title: World's largest automated container terminal starts operation in Shanghai
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: As part of the Shanghai Free Trade Zone, the system can operate completely unmanned.

item.title: World's largest automated container terminal starts operation in Shanghai
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: As part of the Shanghai Free Trade Zone, the system can operate completely unmanned.

item.title: World's largest automated container terminal starts operation in Shanghai
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: As part of the Shanghai Free Trade Zone, the system can operate completely unmanned.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: China launches communication satellite for Algeria
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: China launched Algeria's first communication satellite, Alcomsat-1, into a preset orbit from the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in the southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: Chinese, Algerian presidents hail successful launch of communications satellite
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: President Xi Jinping and his Algerian counterpart Abdelaziz Bouteflika exchanged congratulatory messages on the successful launch of Alcomsat-1 in the Xichang Satellite Launch Center in China's southwestern province of Sichuan early Monday.

item.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

item.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

item.title: Autopsy: Jiang suffered several injuries before the fatal stab
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The trial of the alleged murderer of Chinese student Jiang Ge began at 10 am on Monday in Tokyo. It will last seven days and the verdict is expected on Dec 20.

item.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

item.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

item.title: Asia's tallest wooden pagoda destroyed
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: The 16-story structure was said to be the tallest wooden pagoda in Asia. No casualties were reported in the incident. The cause of the blaze is under investigation.

item.title: Guizhou: Western province looks to the future of big data
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: While located in the remote southwestern part of China, Guizhou leads the development of Big Data technology in recent years.

item.title: Guizhou: Western province looks to the future of big data
item.author: 中国日报-国内
item.description: While located in the remote southwestern part of China, Guizhou leads the development of Big Data technology in recent years.
